fields.label: Display Name
fields.help: A name that reflects your agent's personality

fields.label: Role
fields.placeholder: e.g., Research analyst, Code reviewer, Writing assistant
fields.help: What this agent does — its job title

fields.label: Creature Type
fields.help: A flavor for your agent's self-image

fields.label: Model Tier
fields.help: Strong = best quality (Claude Sonnet, GPT-4o). Fast = lower latency (Haiku, GPT-4o-mini). Local = free (Ollama).

fields.label: Max Response Length
fields.help: Maximum tokens per response. Higher = longer responses but more cost.

fields.label: Status
fields.help: Inactive agents don't respond to messages

fields.label: Emoji
fields.help: A single emoji that represents this agent

fields.label: Purpose Statement
fields.placeholder: A one-paragraph mission statement for this agent
fields.help: Displayed in agent listings and team views
